products.description: Ideal for placing in the hallway or at the end of your bed, our Nieve bench has been crafted using a solid oak frame. A fully upholstered velvet seat adds rich tones and rests on four oversized cylindrical legs for a contemporary twist.

products.name: Vivienne Bench, Natural Boucle, US
products.description: A rounded silhouette upholstered in tactile boucle is designed as an extension of our House favorite Vivienne range. Inspired by our members' favorite Vivienne sofa on the eighth floor of White City House, this bench is designed to perfectly complement the Vivienne bed. Its rounded silhouette comes fully upholstered in tactile natural boucle.

products.name: Marcia Bench, Antique Rose Velvet, US
products.description: The relaxed silhouette is finished with feather-wrapped cushions upholstered in velvet. Designed as part of our Marcia collection, this bench similarly echoes the relaxed social setting of Shoreditch House. Secured by a solid oak framing at either side, its silhouette is fitted with a feather-wrapped seat cushion and two bolster cushions fully upholstered in velvet in our made-to-order palette.

products.name: Willis Bench, Velvet, Rust, US
products.description: Our Willis bench adds a touch of vintage-inspired glamor to any interiors scheme with channeled seat detail and soft, velvet upholstery for a textural finish. Inspired by Holloway House, this piece is ideal for placing in an entrance, living room or at the end of the bed.

products.name: Eli Storage Bench, Linen, Sage, US
products.description: A hardwood frame creates a waved silhouette fitted with a hinged lid that doubles up as seating, thanks to the soft top. Designed to be placed at the foot of your bed, our Eli ottoman has a unique, wave-shaped silhouette crafted from wood and fully upholstered in velvet. Its hinged lid reveals internal storage space for blankets, shoes or clothing, while its bespoke palette is designed to match across our bedroom collection.

products.name: Lukas Bench, Linen, Wheat, US
products.description: A comfortable cushioned seat is fully upholstered in Belgian-made linen and set on solid ash burl legs. Inspired by the coastal influences seen in Little Beach House Barcelona, the Lukas bench has a minimalist silhouette set on ash burl legs. Designed to be positioned at the end of your bed, it has a cushioned top that's fully wrapped in 100% Belgian linen available in a range of our bespoke shades.

products.name: Willis Bench, Boucle, Natural, US
products.description: Our Willis bench adds a touch of vintage-inspired glamor to any interiors scheme with channelled seat detail and boucle upholstery for a textural finish. Inspired by Soho House Holloway, this piece is ideal for placing in an entrance, living room or at the end of the bed.

products.name: Esther Bench, Velvet, Olive, US
products.description: A cushioned velvet seat and solid oak legs defined by ribbed detailing are inspired by our original London House. The Esther bench is inspired by the interiors of our original House at 40 Greek Street. Designed to sit at the end of your bed, its cushioned seat and fixed bolster cushions are fully upholstered in tactile velvet in your choice of bespoke color. At the base, solid oak legs are characterized by intricately carved ribbed detailing.

products.name: Hallie Bench, Velvet, Olive, US
products.description: A blind-tufted, velvet-covered seat cushion rests on an oak burl silhouette. Our Hallie bench is set on large, tapered legs, made from oak burl. Gentle curves feature on each end of the silhouette, while an olive cotton velvet seat cushion rests on top, offering a comfortable place to sit.

products.name: Alvis Desk
products.description: The curved tabletop is crowned with inset oak burl veneer and rests on four solid oak legs. Combining simplicity with function, the Alvis desk features a floating oak burl desktop that rests above four drawers with reeded detailing. Each drawer features inset handles, and the desk is supported by four brown-stained oak legs.

products.name: Donato Desk
products.description: Two drawers feature a natural oak finish with a chiselled texture, offset by dark oak accents. Taking inspiration from Soho Beach House Canouan, the Donato desk showcases two natural-tone oak drawers with a chiselled exterior. The curved silhouette is complemented by a dark oak top, full-length legs and inset handles.

products.name: Arranmore Desk, Walnut Burl
products.description: An organically shaped top contrasts against the structural finishes of the pill-shaped legs and angular storage drawers. Echoing the natural shapes and finishes of Soho Roc House, the top of our Arranmore desk has an organic edge. Stablised by three solid pilla-shaped timber legs with angular storage drawers at one side, it combines walnut burl veneer with oak, beech and walnut woods.

products.name: Wilmot Desk
products.description: Ridged detailing carved into the solid oak wood creates a textural finish around a curved silhouette. Taking inspiration from Soho Works White City, the Wilmot desk is crafted from solid and veneer oak with a fluted finish. Blackened brass handles detail the four top drawers that add storage space at either side.

products.name: Farley Desk
products.description: Made from blonde mappa burl with a honed dark Emperador marble top to create a pill-shaped silhouette. The Farley desk features six curved drawers encased in blonde mappa burl, with a contrasting, honed dark Emperador marble tabletop. Accented with maple veneer, this pill-shaped desk is fitted with matching marble and antique brass-finished handles.

products.name: Marena Desk
products.description: A solid oak silhouette is defined by an eye-catching square stud front that brings textural depth to your home office space. Echoing similar styles seen in Soho House Barcelona, the Marena desk is characterised by the warm tones of its solid and veneer oak wood silhouette, as well as the geometric patternwork across the front. Two top drawers and two lower cupboards provide storage space.

products.name: Railton Desk, Dark Emperador Marble
products.description: A wraparound pedestal base is carved from fluted oak wook and contrasted against a dark Emperador marble top. A wraparound pedestal base means that the Railton desk can be placed in the centre of the room and viewed from any angle. Characterised by deep brown tones and white veining, a Spanish Emperador marble top complements the textural oak wood silhouette, which is fitted with two drawers, two cupboards and two internal shelves for storage.

products.name: Wilmot Desk, Large
products.description: Ridged detailing curves around a dark oak silhouette, built to blend beauty with function. Inspired by Soho Works White City, this elongated version of our Wilmot desk is crafted from a mix of solid and veneer oak. A cadet-blue leather top and four dovetail drawers allow room to organise your workspace, while the ridged detailing that curves around its silhouette creates a statement piece for your home office.

products.name: Wallace Desk, Mappa Burl
products.description: Book-matched mappa burl characterised by natural variances in the wood creates a minimalist, arched silhouette. Designed as a structural twist on classic office furniture, the Wallace desk takes style cues from London's 180 House. Its simple, arched silhouette is crafted from book-matched mappa burl.

products.name: Aldo Desk
products.description: Crafted from solid oak to create a compact silhouette ideal for smaller workspaces, finished with a leather top and marble handles. Combining simplicity with function, the Aldo desk takes its style cues from 180 House. Crafted from solid oak, the compact design is fitted with two side drawers to keep your home workspace free from clutter. A smooth-leather inlay at the top is complemented by handles crafted from brass and Black Marquina marble.

products.name: Willow Shelving, Mint, Low
products.description: A low silhouette is designed with three shelves and a high-gloss lacquer finish. Inspired by Soho House Copenhagen, the Willow shelving unit features a low silhouette with three curved shelves in a high-gloss lacquer, providing a cool mint colour. Resting on spindle bobbin legs, this piece will bring a contemporary look to your living space.

products.name: Willow Shelving, Cream, Tall
products.description: A tall silhouette is designed with four shelves and a high-gloss lacquer finish. Inspired by Soho House Copenhagen, the Willow shelving unit features a tall silhouette with four curved shelves in a high-gloss lacquer, providing a neutral cream colour. Resting on spindle bobbin legs, this piece will bring a contemporary look to your living space.

products.name: Elwood Shelving
products.description: This shelving unit has been crafted from solid oak and can stand alone or be paired with another unit to create a room partition. Inspired by 180 House, the Elwood shelving unit features varying shelf heights to allow for both large and small-scale items, with smooth, rounded edges.

products.name: Dorian Console Unit, Brazilian Quartzite
products.description: Fitted with two drawers and an adjustable shelf hidden behind tambour doors, this curved, wooden console is defined by its Brazilian quartzite top. Inspired by the interiors of White City House, the Dorian console has a curved front carved from oak wood in a mix of mid and dark stains. Its ribbed silhouette is finished with a polished Brazilian quartzite top.

products.name: Siya Console, Dark Emperador Marble
products.description: Olive-stained oak burl and Dark Emperador marble come together in a softly curved, pill-shaped silhouette. Oak burl is treated with a deep olive stain and a high-gloss finish for our Siya console table. Featuring a shallow top drawer, the design has an inset top and low-sitting shelf made from Dark Emperador marble, which is defined by its earthy brown hue and light-coloured veining.

products.name: Althea Console Table, Silver Travertine
products.description: Our pill-shaped Althea console table features a silver travertine top on tapered oak legs. This sleek console table highlights unfilled travertine stone to echo the raw and organic material finishes at Soho Roc House. Sourced from Turkey, this particular stone displays shimmering tones of silver, grey, and cream. Solid oak legs are applied with a wire-brush finish for contrasting texture.

products.name: Wallace Shelves, Mappa Burl
products.description: A softly rounded, arched silhouette is crafted from mappa burl with a symmetrical bookmatched finish. Inspired by the interiors of London's 180 House, the Wallace shelving unit is crafted from bookmatched mappa burl. Its irregular built-in shelving units are designed to store and showcase books, decorative ornaments and plants.

products.name: Tiber Console Table, Brazilian Quartzite
products.description: A polished Brazilian quartzite top on oak burl legs showcases natural gold, peach and burnt orange tones. Drawing inspiration from Soho House Rome, and Italian art history in general, our Tiber console table combines oak burl legs, characterised by brown heartwood and natural, darker patterning, with a polished Brazilian quartzite top.

products.name: Wallace Console, Mappa Burl
products.description: Mappa burl wood is manipulated into a sculptural, arched design. A structural twist on classic console tables, the Wallace is formed from mappa burl that's characterised by natural patterns in its surface.

products.name: Locanda Console, Dark Emperador Marble
products.description: Intricately scalloped panels of olive ash burl curve around rounded sides, supporting a top made from earthy Dark Emperador marble. The Locanda console table is designed to perfectly complement our first freestanding bar. Inspired by Soho House Rome, it showcases a mix of materials, combining artfully carved panels of olive ash burl with an earthy brown Dark Emperador marble top sourced from Spain.

products.name: Marin Shelving Unit
products.description: Alternating shelves in mid-tone American oak sit above an oak sideboard characterised by ridged sliding doors. Taking inspiration from similar styles seen in Soho House Chicago, the Marin unit is crafted from mid-tone American oak with vertical grooved detailing to echo the House's aesthetic. Alternating shelves sit above the sideboard, designed for storing books or displaying objects, while reinforced sliding doors underneath open onto additional storage space with an adjustable shelf.

products.name: Ramsey Console Table
products.description: A pedestal base in brown-stained olive ash burl supports a Classico Travertine tabletop. Inspired by the interiors of Soho Roc House, the Ramsey console table is designed with a brown-stained pedestal base, crafted from olive ash burl. On top sits a honed piece of Classico Travertine, left raw at the edges for an organic finish.

products.name: Maven Shelving Unit
products.description: Crafted from polished Noir Grande marble, conical cones support three shelves. The Maven shelving unit is crafted from a striking Noir Grande marble, instantly recognisable for its contrasting black and white colouring. Three pill-shaped shelves are supported by marble cones, with a sleek, polished finish.

products.name: Esti Rug, 170 x 240cm
products.description: Vintage-style florals are knotted by hand from pure wool pile in a warm colour palette. Knotted by hand in India with a pure wool pile, the Esti rug features oversized dahlias in a warm colour palette, echoing the vintage-style florals seen throughout Soho House 40 Greek Street.

products.name: Obie Rug Multi, 300 x 420cm
products.description: Originally hand-painted by our in-house design team using watercolours, our Obie rug has been hand-knotted with wool and features abstract floral motifs inspired by Art Nouveau. Place it in a bedroom or living area to reference the calming tones of Soho House Rome.

products.name: Elwood Shelving Centre Unit
products.description: This shelving unit has been crafted from solid oak and can stand alone or be paired with another unit to create a room partition. Inspired by 180 House, the Elwood shelving unit features varying shelf heights to allow for both large and small-scale items, with smooth, rounded edges.

products.name: Jethro Rug, Rust 170 x 240cm
products.description: Melange yarn adds texture and dimension to this flat-woven design. Our Jethro rug is made from a soft cotton-wool blend. The use of melange yarn provides a tactile finish, detailed with a checkerboard motif inspired by the tiles at Soho House Bangkok.

products.name: Morongo Rug, Ochre 170 x 240cm
products.description: Featuring a high knot count, this piece is hand-crafted in India by skilled artisans. The pattern on our Morongo rug reflects the distinctive design found on vintage bandanas, hand-knotted in India with a pure wool pile. Detailed with a stylised floral border, shades of ochre and cream echo the earthy yellows seen throughout Soho House Portland.

products.name: Locke Rug, 170 x 240cm
products.description: A hand-painted artwork by a Soho Home designer, recreated through a hand-knotted wool pile. Crafted by skilled artisans, our Locke rug brings to life a painted artwork inspired by the textures, shadows and layered foliage of Babington House gardens. The abstract wash of colours and blurred shapes allows the rug to layer colour into a room effortlessly.

products.name: Auden Rug, 170 x 240cm
products.description: This hand-knotted design is crafted with a blend of high and low pile for a soft, tactile feel. Inspired by the fabrics and high-pile rugs found in 180 House, the Auden rug offers a textural finish thanks to its varying pile heights. Detailed with a fine-scale geometric pattern, a rich Bordeaux pile is used to create a striking contrast against the neutral cream base.

products.name: Theron Rug, 170 x 240cm
products.description: A hand-tufted, repeated pattern in a warm, neutral colour palette. Hand-tufted in India, our Theron rug is detailed with a repetitive pattern, inspired by the fabrics and neutral shades found throughout Soho House Tel Aviv, Jaffa.

products.name: Atticus Rug, 170 x 240cm
products.description: This piece is hand-tufted with a pure wool pile to create a decorative design. The border of the Atticus rug is detailed with a repetitive motif, which references colourful floor tiles. The colour palette draws inspiration from Soho House Rome.

products.name: Raya Rug Rust, 170 x 240cm
products.description: This piece is crafted from a wool-mix pile and features a hand-drawn pattern applied with a hand-tufting technique. The bold, irregular motif of our Raya rug is inspired by the graphic geometrics found throughout White City House. A contrasting pile adds texture and sheen, while the versatile design makes it ideal for placing under a sofa, bed or dining table.

products.name: Porter Rug, 170 x 240cm
products.description: Natural variations in the wool and jute mean every rug has a unique depth of texture. Soho Roc House is known for its calming interiors and sea views, and the design of our Porter rug draws inspiration from its neutral decor. Natural, undyed wool and jute yarns are artfully woven together by hand to form its versatile design

products.name: Ovington Rug, 20 x 30cm Swatch
products.description: A colourful, hand-knotted pattern puts a twist on our classic Soho House stripe. Hand-knotted using traditional techniques, our Ovington rug takes up to six months to create. Its pattern is infused with brighter tones designed to complement our made-to-order collections.

products.name: Delphi Rug, 170 x 240cm
products.description: A geometric border brings vibrancy to this classic rectangular rug, designed in-house. The Delphi rug is our take on geometric patterns in a mix of colours, with each one designed to tie in to our made-to-order palette. Hand-tufted in India, bound edge detail adds a contrasting finish.

products.name: Chapman Rug, 170 x 240cm
products.description: Hand-tufted from a tactile New Zealand wool blend to create a geometric border design. The Chapman rug combines a warm, neutral base with a patterned border in deep greens and blues, inspired by the bold colours and geometric patterns seen throughout Soho Warehouse in Downtown LA. The border can help to define the layout of your space, such as layering under a dining table or in the centre of your living space.

products.name: Adamson Rug, 170 x 240cm
products.description: Hand tufting showcases cut-pile and looped techniques that create a subtle contrast. Rich tones fill the interiors of Soho House Hong Kong, mirrored here in the colours of our Adamson rug, designed to match back to our made-to-order palette. It creates subtle contrast with a mix of cut-pile and looped techniques hand-tufted by skilled craftspeople.

products.name: Thayer Rug, 170 x 240cm
products.description: Hand-knotted wool creates an abstract pattern in warm, natural tones. The hand-knotted pattern of our Thayer rug takes inspiration from the abstract elements in the traditional woven ikats seen throughout the bedrooms of Soho Farmhouse.

products.name: Paynes Rug, 170 x 240cm
products.description: A hand-tufted, geometric style finished in a versatile palette. Our Paynes rug showcases the versatility of geometric design, hand-tufted in a warm, neutral palette that pairs across our made-to-order collections. Viscose fibres are used to create a subtle, silk-like sheen that highlights specific areas of the pattern.

products.name: Jarrett Rug, Cream, 170 x 240cm
products.description: This wool-blend rug has been hand-tufted in India by skilled artisans and features an abstract geometric pattern designed in-house. Inspired by the rugs at White City House, the Jarret rug features a variegated high and low pile to create depth and texture.

products.name: Raimundo Rug, 170 x 240cm
products.description: The Raimundo is a dhurrie rug, also known as a flat-woven rug. Handcrafted in India from a combination of wool and jute. Our skilled artisans use a traditional technique to create them for hardwearing and timeless appeal. Made to work in a variety of different interiors and locations, place in an area with high footfall such as the living room and dining room.

products.name: Hetty Rug, 170 x 240cm
products.description: Repeated florals hand-knotted from pure wool pile create a pattern inspired by the uneven finishes of traditional block-print artworks. The repeated floral pattern on our Hetty rug takes inspiration from similar contemporary flowers seen on the cushions and upholstery in the bedrooms of Babington House.

products.name: Blake Rug Cream, 170 x 240cm
products.description: Designed in-house and hand-tufted in India, the Blake rug uses a sculpting technique to create geometric lines that echo the textiles seen throughout Soho House Amsterdam in a tonal palette of brown, grey and cream.
